product_overview: QuillHaven is an AI-powered, context-aware writing platform designed specifically for long-form, chapter-based storytelling that supports comprehensive narrative coherence, character and plot consistency, and intuitive project management for writers of all skill levels.
core_goals: Establish market leadership as the premier AI tool for novel and long-form writing
Achieve 70%+ user retention at 90 days through superior context management
Build a sustainable freemium business model with 15-20% conversion to paid subscriptions
Foster an active community of writers engaged in long-form creative projects
key_features: Core AI Writing Engine generating complete chapters (1,000-5,000 words) with contextual awareness and iteration support
Project Management system with metadata, chapter organization via drag-and-drop, version control, progress tracking, and export functionality (DOCX, PDF, TXT)
Advanced Context Management including character database with relationships, plot thread monitoring, world-building consistency, and timeline tracking
User Account Management with secure email registration, profile management, password recovery, and GDPR/CCPA compliance
Basic Editing Interface offering distraction-free environment, chapter navigation, search and replace, grammar/spell check, and real-time word count
Authentication backend and frontend components with JWT tokens, bcryptjs password hashing, email verification, and password reset
Reusable UI components using Radix UI and Tailwind CSS ensuring consistent design
Validation system powered by Zod schemas for input sanitation and safety
Middleware ensuring rate limiting, CORS, validation, and security
Email service integration for authentication flows
Health check API endpoint for system monitoring
Jest-based testing setup for code quality and reliability
user_flow_summary: New User Onboarding: from landing page through registration, welcome flow, initial project and chapter creation with tutorials
Chapter Creation Flow: project selection, context review, chapter setup with AI generation, iterative editing and saving
Context Management Flow: detailed character creation, plot and world-building tracking, timeline management, and automatic AI context integration
validation_criteria: User can generate and regenerate chapters of 1,000-5,000 words within 60 seconds maintaining high narrative coherence
Project creation, chapter reordering, version history retention (minimum 30 days), and export completion within 30 seconds
Character, plot, and world-building information tracked and referenced automatically during generation
User authentication completes efficiently with secure password reset and session management
Editor loads under 3 seconds with autosave every 30 seconds and effective find/replace capability
Freemium conversion rate target of 15%-20% and user retention above 70% at 90 days
System uptime target of 99.5% with GDPR/CCPA compliance and AES-256 encryption of all user data

features.name: Database Schema

features.description: Complete authentication system with JWT tokens, password hashing, email verification, and password reset functionality

features.description: React components for user authentication including login, register, password reset forms and auth context management

features.name: Authentication Service
features.description: Frontend service layer for handling authentication API calls and token management

features.description: Reusable UI components built with Radix UI and Tailwind CSS

features.name: Validation System
features.description: Input validation and sanitization utilities using Zod schemas

features.name: Middleware System
features.description: API middleware for rate limiting, CORS, validation, and authentication

features.name: Type Definitions
features.description: TypeScript type definitions for authentication and database models

features.description: Email service integration for authentication flows
